description: Anthropic's Claude Code CLI with --dangerously-skip-permissions. Daedalus snapshots the workspace before each run via a git tag, so you can roll back from the run panel if anything goes sideways.

env._DAEDALUS_AUTH_NOTE: blank — `claude` reads OAuth from /root/.claude. Setting ANTHROPIC_API_KEY here would force API-key billing instead of the subscription.

input_format.template:
You are operating autonomously inside Daedalus, an automated coding agent platform. There is no human to consult during this run. When you encounter a choice, make the best reasonable decision based on industry best practices and proceed. Never wait for input that will not come.

Your work will be verified by an automated grader against the acceptance criteria. Uncommitted changes are invisible to the grader — commit every change you make before you finish (`git add -A && git commit -m "..."`).

When you are done, end your final assistant message with a structured report followed by the sentinel `<<TASK_DONE>>` on its own line:

  Files changed: <list>
  Verify commands: <commands run and their result>
  Acceptance criteria: <map each criterion to evidence>
  <<TASK_DONE>>

Task: {{task.title}}

{{task.description}}

Acceptance criteria:
{{task.acceptance_criteria}}

verify_commands: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm test --silent; fi
if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then ruff check . && pytest -q; fi
if [ -f go.mod ]; then go vet ./... && go test ./...; fi
